games.title: Dual Wield
games.description: Dual Wield is a first-person shooter developed over three months using the Unity Game Engine as part of a university group project. Players wield two firearms simultaneously, allowing up to 10 unique weapon combinations to tackle the enemies they encounter.
games.summary: A Unity FPS built around dual-weapon combat and 10 weapon combinations.

games.title: Caved In
games.description: Caved In is a cooperative first-person survival extraction game, developed over three months in Unreal Engine as part of a university group project. Players must work together to collect samples and escape the cave, all while avoiding infection.
games.summary: A cooperative Unreal extraction game about sampling, survival, and escape.

games.title: PacStudent
games.description: PacStudent is a recreation of the classic 1980 game Pac-Man, developed as part of an introductory game development subject. This project served as a case study while I learned to navigate and utilise the Unity Game Engine for the first time.
games.summary: A Unity recreation of Pac-Man created while learning core game systems.

games.title: Wormy
games.description: Wormy is a 2D puzzle game developed in Unity as part of a group assessment task. It was our first opportunity to design a game based entirely on our own ideas. In Wormy, you play as a worm navigating a maze of underground tunnels to fertilize and grow a seed.
games.summary: A 2D Unity puzzle game about navigating tunnels to grow a seed.

games.title: Snaked Together
games.description: You and a friend control a two-headed snake, bound together on a desperate climb from the depths of hell to the gates of heaven. The Catch? Only one head can move at a time, try moving together, and you'll tumble straight back down.
games.summary: A cooperative climbing game where two players share one snake body.

web.title: Online Grocery Store
web.description: I developed a fully functional Online Grocery Store as a solo project, utilising HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, and SQL. The website features a user-friendly interface that allows customers to browse products, add items to their cart, and complete purchases seamlessly.
web.summary: A full-stack grocery storefront with browsing, cart, and checkout flows.

web.title: Online Car Rental
web.description: I developed an interactive online car rental system as a solo project, using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, AJAX, and JSON. The platform allows users to browse and search cars by type or brand, check availability, and make or cancel rental reservations.
web.summary: A car rental platform with filtering, availability checks, and bookings.

mobile.title: Quiz App
mobile.description: Quiz App is an iOS application developed over a few weeks as part of a group project using the SwiftUI framework. The app fetches quizzes on various topics via an API, providing users with a range of quiz options.
mobile.summary: A SwiftUI quiz app that fetches topic-based quizzes from an API.

mobile.title: Task Tracker App
mobile.description: OnTaskPro is an iOS app I developed as part of an individual assessment, where I was tasked with brainstorming, designing, and building an app to address a real-world problem for a specific target audience.
mobile.summary: An iOS productivity app designed around a real user problem.

modelling.title: 3D Modelling Project
modelling.description: This personal project involved creating a detailed 3D model of a house using Blender to develop my modelling, UV unwrapping, texturing, lighting and rendering skills. I focused on achieving realism by using my own photographs and free textures sourced online.
modelling.summary: A Blender environment study focused on modelling, UVs, materials, and lighting.

modelling.title: Unity 3D Animation
modelling.description: "Why are we here?" is a 3D animation satire on first-person shooters, heavily inspired by Halo and Red vs. Blue. It was developed over a few weeks in Unity using the HDRP rendering pipeline for a group project, where we used existing 3D models.
modelling.summary: A Unity HDRP animation project inspired by FPS machinima comedy.

other.title: Clash of Commands
other.description: Clash of Commands is an educational game that helps IT students learn UNIX terminal commands through gamification. I gained hands-on experience in serious game design, user-centered development, and iterative improvements based on feedback.
other.summary: A serious game that teaches UNIX commands through repeatable challenges.
